nodes.label: Claude Code hooks pass a JSON payload on stdin.     This script tolerates missin
Tries a few plausible field names; exact keys can vary across hook types/version
Extract Anthropic token usage from an assistant message, if present.
Parse a Claude Code jsonl row timestamp (ISO 8601 with trailing Z).
Reads only new bytes since ss.offset. Keeps ss.buffer for partial last line.
Groups incremental transcript rows into turns:     user (non-tool-result) -> ass
Convert a datetime to OTel-style nanoseconds since epoch.
Create a Langfuse observation with an explicit OTel start_time.      Bypasses la
